name: Picadillo (Rice & Beef Hash/filling)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil over medium heat in a 10-inch skillet. Add ground beef and cook until crumbly, stirring occasionally with a wooden spoon to break up large pieces. Add onion and garlic; sauté until softened for about 5 minutes. Stir in the remaining ingredients. Reduce heat to low and continue cooking, stirring occasionally, until flavors are well blended for about 20 minutes.
2. Serve over rice or use as a filling for burritos or tacos.
